pi_items.source: Verified against task description and verifier.py exact string match check.
Verified against verifier.py VLM prompt which checks for these acceptable categories.
Verified against task description and verifier.py VLM prompt.
Verified against setup_adaudit_plus.ps1 and setup_task.sh which configure and launch the application on port 8081.
Verified against install_adaudit_plus.ps1 which sets the admin password to Admin@2024 via browser automation.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating an alert profile named 'ADAudit Configuration Monitor' with 'Critical' severity under the 'ADAudit Plus Audit', 'Technician Audit', or 'Administrative Audit' category. The target application is running locally at http://localhost:8081. The administrator credentials are 'admin' with password 'Admin@2024', configured during environment setup. The underlying data consists of real Windows Security events generated by actual OS commands.
